falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes below 3950 (key support level) on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a breakdown pattern rather than a bottom formation, invalidating the 82% bottom_2024_aug pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme market stress and potential blowoff top scenario, contradicting the current HOLD signal and bottom pattern assumptions

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NYSE exceeds 20% of the 50-day average volume for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate a major trend reversal, disproving the current UNKNOWN verdict and HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
